overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 127 条，入选 14 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 127 previously displayed items excluded, and 14 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 重点：HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

items.title: Claude Meets Blackwell Ultra: Anthropic’s Models Now Run on NVIDIA GB300 in Azure
items.summary_zh: 重点：Anthropic’s Claude models in Microsoft Foundry — hosted on Microsoft Azure and running on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs — are now generally available, giving Azure-native enterprises a powerful new way to build autonomous and domain-specific AI agents.

items.title: Realtime voice, speech, and transcription now supported on AI Gateway

items.title: Sandboxes now expire based on last use
items.summary_zh: 重点：Vercel Sandbox snapshots now expire based on when they were last used, not when they were created. Active snapshots stay alive as long as workflows depend on them, while unused snapshots expire on their retention policy to keep storage in check. Every time
items.summary_en: Focus: Vercel Sandbox snapshots now expire based on when they were last used, not when they were created. items.title: Memora: A Harmonic Memory Representation Balancing Abstraction and Specificity
items.summary_zh: 重点：AI agents can't remember past conversations. They must constantly reload or retrieve context, which grows less efficient as tasks get longer and more complex. Memora solves this with a scalable memory system separating what’s stored from how it's retrieved.
items.summary_en: Focus: AI agents can't remember past conversations. They must constantly reload or retrieve context, which grows less efficient as tasks get longer and more complex.
